title: viola hultenii
intro: Viola hultenii, also known as the high-altitude pansy or Hulten's violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola hultenii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola hultenii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal remedies, though more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
